package.name: Media
package.description: File viewers for browser-supported audio and video formats

features.name: Audio File Viewer
features.description: Previews browser-supported audio files (mp3, wav, flac, ogg, opus, m4a, aac, weba) inline using the native browser audio player. Registered as a file viewer so Datagrok opens audio files automatically in the appropriate…

members.name: audioViewer
members.description: Previews audio files using the native browser player

features.name: Video File Viewer
features.description: Previews browser-supported video files (mp4, m4v, webm, ogv, mov) inline using the native browser video player. Registered as a file viewer so Datagrok opens video files automatically in the appropriate panel.

members.name: videoViewer
members.description: Previews video files using the native browser player
